data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a consequence lifecycle that can be cancelled or reverted. However, the evidence provided does not demonstrate that such a lifecycle exists or is implemented. The linked use case mentions the cancellation of consequences, but there is no concrete evidence or API interaction that confirms the ability to cancel or revert consequences in the current state of the saga.
gaps: No evidence of a mechanism to cancel or revert consequences in the consequence lifecycle.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
